by
                  classical
                  by_cases hfmeas : @Measurable _ _ (borel (spectrum ℂ a)) _ f
                  · by_cases hfbdd : ∃ C : ℝ, ∀ z, ‖f z‖ ≤ C
                    · rcases hfbdd with ⟨C', hC'⟩
                      refine continuous_of_continuousAt ?_
                      intro y
                      refine ContinuousAt.of_norm_sub_le ?_
                      have hbound : ∀ y' : H, ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y').integral f‖ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y'‖ * C' :=
                        fun y' => bfc_bounded (ha := ha) (a := a) (x := x) (y := y') (C := C') (f := f) hC' hfmeas
                      refine (tendsto_principal.2 ?_)
                      intro ε hε
                      refine ⟨{y' | ‖y' - y‖ < ε / (‖x‖ * C' + 1)}, ?_, ?_⟩
                      · simp [isOpen_lt, continuous_norm, continuous_const, continuous_sub, hε]
                      · simp [hε]
                      · intro y' hy'
                        have : ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y').integral f - (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖
                            ≤ ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x (y' - y)).integral f‖ := by
                              simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, map_add, map_neg] using le_of_eq (by ring_nf)
                        have hle := le_trans this (hbound (y' - y))
                        have hpos : 0 ≤ ‖x‖ * C' + 1 := by nlinarith [norm_nonneg x]
                        have : ‖x‖ * ‖y' - y‖ * C' ≤ (‖x‖ * C' + 1) * ‖y' - y‖ := by
                          nlinarith [mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg x) (norm_nonneg (y' - y))]
                        have hle' : ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x (y' - y)).integral f‖ ≤ (‖x‖ * C' + 1) * ‖y' - y‖ :=
                          le_trans hle (by simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using this)
                        have : (‖x‖ * C' + 1) * ‖y' - y‖ < (‖x‖ * C' + 1) * (ε / (‖x‖ * C' + 1)) := by
                          exact mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left (by simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using hy') (lt_of_lt_of_le (by linarith) hpos)
                        have : (‖x‖ * C' + 1) * (ε / (‖x‖ * C' + 1)) = ε := by
                          field_simp [ne_of_gt (lt_of_lt_of_le (by linarith) hpos)]
                        exact lt_of_le_of_lt hle' (by simpa [this] using this)
                    ·
                      have : f = 0 := by
                        ext z
                        by_contra h
                        have : ∃ C : ℝ, ∀ z, ‖f z‖ ≤ C := ⟨‖f z‖, by
                          intro z'
                          exact le_trans (by simpa using le_rfl) (le_of_lt (by simpa [h] using lt_of_le_of_ne' (le_rfl) h))⟩
                        exact (hfbdd this).elim
                      subst this
                      simpa using continuous_const
                  ·
                    have : f = 0 := by
                      ext z; simp
                    subst this
                    simpa using continuous_const

                      simpa [hfmeas] using (bfc_bounded (ha := ha) (f := f) (x := x) (y := y)
                        (C := C) (fun z => by simpa using (by
                          have := (show ‖f z‖ ≤ C from by
                            simpa using (by
                              have := (show True from trivial)
                              exact le_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_lt (le_rfl) (lt_of_lt_of_le (by simpa) (le_rfl)))))
                          exact this)) hfmeas)
                    have hLip : LipschitzWith (Real.toNNReal (‖x‖ * C))
                        (fun y : H => ComplexMeasure.integral (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y) f) := by
                      refine LipschitzWith.of_dist_le_mul ?_
                      intro y₁ y₂
                      have hsub : ‖ComplexMeasure.integral (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x (y₁ - y₂)) f‖
                          ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y₁ - y₂‖ * C := by
                        simpa [map_sub] using (bfc_bounded (ha := ha) (f := f) (x := x) (y := (y₁ - y₂))
                          (C := C) (fun z => by simpa using (by
                            have := (show True from trivial)
                            exact le_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_lt (le_rfl) (lt_of_lt_of_le (by simpa) (le_rfl)))))
                          hfmeas)
                      have : dist (ComplexMeasure.integral (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y₁) f)
                          (ComplexMeasure.integral (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y₂) f)
                          = ‖ComplexMeasure.integral (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x (y₁ - y₂)) f‖ := by
                        simp [dist_eq_norm, map_sub, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc]
                      -- convert the bound
                      have hn : 0 ≤ ‖x‖ * C := mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg _) (le_of_lt (by
                        have : (0:ℝ) < C ∨ C ≤ 0 := lt_or_ge 0 C
                        cases this with
                        | inl h => exact h
                        | inr h => exact lt_of_le_of_ne' h (by simp)))
                      -- avoid sign issues by using `Real.toNNReal` coefficient
                      have : dist (ComplexMeasure.integral (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y₁) f)
                          (ComplexMeasure.integral (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y₂) f)
                          ≤ (‖x‖ * C) * dist y₁ y₂ := by
                        simpa [this, dist_eq_norm, norm_sub_rev] using (le_trans hsub (by
                          gcongr
                          simp [dist_eq_norm]))
                      simpa [Real.coe_toNNReal, max_eq_left (mul_nonneg (norm_nonneg _) (le_of_lt (by
                        have : (0:ℝ) < C ∨ C ≤ 0 := lt_or_ge 0 C
                        cases this with
                        | inl h => exact h
                        | inr h => exact lt_of_le_of_ne' h (by simp))))] using this
                    exact hLip.continuous

                        = fun _y : H => 0 := by
